{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232005257446723AAEF5F2E08813"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616391021044024089","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"四星是完成可以的，虽然没有太多的亮点，但好在剧情上没有太多的槽点，不像那些一天天就知道写反派的内心想法阴谋诡计和聊天频道那些没用的废话。缺点我感觉就是主角对女人那点事太扭扭捏捏"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773331248,"group_id":"7602981973107149849","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6WwcixnPIiOhSSxB3D6x1rMFW7tZQ9sKJy4cpmq8Xnz","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1367444139019160","user_name":"喜欢水八角的齐渊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1367444139019160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602981973107149849","book_info":{"abstract":"【航海求生】+【打造船只】+【序列】+【多女主】+【克苏鲁】
 一觉醒来，刘澈穿进诡异疯狂的航海世界，开局只有一块破木筏和一把烂鱼竿。
当别人在海上捡垃圾苟活时。
他大手一挥，统统神级进化！
划不动的破木筏？
进化！
神级木筏自动巡航，劈波斩浪，海上飙速如冲浪！
一扭就断的烂鱼竿？
进化！
神级钓竿垂落深海，从小虾米钓到深渊海龙，旧日眷族也得上钩！
软弱无力的破木弓？
进化！
万里追踪，百步穿杨，一箭射穿迷雾中的邪神之眼！
……
从孤岛废墟到海底迷城，从幽暗海沟到终焉深渊。
海面之下，旧日支配者的阴影蠢蠢欲动；
甲板之上，他与各路红颜并肩，在疯狂与理智的边缘翩翩起舞。
当【终焉方舟】横空出世，碾碎巨影与不可名状时。
旧日之主跪伏于舷窗之外，哀求怜悯。
刘澈慵懒倚在温暖船舱内，摇晃酒杯，淡然一笑。
 “怎么，你也想进化了？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oa3db85db91fdceb14981968dbd594740~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"白白了开水","author_id":"","book_id":"7602981973107149849","book_name":"航海求生：从木筏开始无限进化！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602981983337054745","read_count":"11937","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"158779"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"74","tags":"都市高武","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oa3db85db91fdceb14981968dbd594740~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451525&x-signature=ZEOZh%2F8FRwybtoxdWjAXRdr%2FHfQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4460047150625710","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232005257446723AAEF5F2E08813"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12179,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21460,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":497},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616675085639828249","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到20章时觉得不错，给了五星好评，结果看到31章时看到一个无法原谅的毒点，于是把五星好评删除，暂时给四星，后面如果还有继续强行降智的描述再回来给三星，看到一次扣一星，就这样[吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773398932,"group_id":"7602981973107149849","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3
